page.content: Between 2019 and 2024, Nippon Yusen experienced significant growth in intermodal transport volumes and port throughput statistics. In 2019, the company reported a Volume of 1,200,000 TEUs, Revenue of $500M, YoY Change of 5.0%, Market Share of 15.0%, with Intermodal at 20.0%, Domestic at 15.0%, and Total of 7,150,000 TEUs with Revenue of $3,550M and an average Growth Metric of 11.9%. The following year, 2020, showed increases with Volume at 1,300,000 TEUs, Revenue of $550M, YoY Change of 8.3%, Market Share of 16.0%, Intermodal at 21.0%, Domestic at 17.0%. In 2021, Volume reached 1,400,000 TEUs, Revenue climbed to $600M, YoY Change was 7.7%, with Market Share at 17.0%, Intermodal at 22.0%, Domestic at 18.0%. By 2022, Volume rose to 1,600,000 TEUs and Revenue to $700M, showing a 16.7% YoY Change and a Market Share of 18.5%, with Intermodal at 23.0% and Domestic at 19.0%. In 2023, Volume increased to 1,750,000 TEUs and Revenue to $800M, achieving a 21.4% YoY Change and a Market Share of 20.0%, with Intermodal at 25.0% and Domestic at 20.0%. Finally, the forecast for 2024 indicates a Volume of 1,900,000 TEUs, Revenue of $900M, an 8.6% YoY Change, Market Share of 22.0%, Intermodal at 27.0%, and Domestic at 22.0%. The Port Throughput Statistics for 2019 recorded Total TEUs at 1,200,000, with a Current Ratio of 1.5, Debt/Equity of 0.8, P/E Ratio of 10.0, Cost per TEU of $5.5%, Revenue Growth at 15.0%, Operating Margin of 12.0%, Net Profit Margin of 24hours, Average Turnaround at 85%.

page.content: In 2020, Total TEUs increased to 1,300,000, with Current Ratio at 1.6, Debt/Equity of 0.9, P/E Ratio of 11.0, Cost per TEU of $6.0%, Revenue Growth of 16.0%, Operating Margin at 13.0%, Net Profit Margin of 23hours, Average Turnaround at 87%. The year 2021 saw Total TEUs reach 1,400,000, Current Ratio at 1.7, Debt/Equity of 1.0, P/E Ratio at 12.0, Cost per TEU of $5.8%, Revenue Growth of 17.0%, Operating Margin at 14.0%, Net Profit Margin of 22hours, Average Turnaround at 89%. In 2022, Total TEUs grew to 1,500,000, Current Ratio at 1.8, Debt/Equity of 1.1, P/E Ratio at 13.0, Cost per TEU of $6.5%, Revenue Growth of 18.0%, Operating Margin at 15.0%, Net Profit Margin of 21hours, Average Turnaround at 90%.
